entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Hi everyone！Welcome to My page! This is my very first post. Check ABOUT.ME for more info. As a begineer in Computer Science, I’d like to record my learning process in some interesting areas like Deep Learning, Multimedia and Web Design, and that is why I spend 5 days to build this primary personal website. However, I have to say that some bugs like the unsuitable display on mobile terminal will bother the browsing experience, and I will try to solve it in the future. What’s more, several useful functions like online comment and page sharing are available now, hope these can help you experience my page better. For this website, I’d like to say thanks to GoDaddy, which provides me a special domain (although it is expensive); and DNSPod, which provides DNS service for free. Github is really an useful tool and helps me to deploy my website. Hexo ,a simple blog framework, includes lots of creative ideas and themes. And thanks to Viosey for your amazing blog project in github. Thanks a lot for reading my first post, and I will compose my blog from now on. P.S. Please forgive my terrible English writing skill:)
